title: Piper numinica
taxonomy: Piper numinica is a species of flowering plant in the family Piperaceae. It belongs to the genus Piper, which includes a variety of pepper plants. The family Piperaceae is a group of plants commonly known as pepper plants, native to tropical and subtropical regions. These plants are usually classified based on their fruit morphology and are known to be dioecious. Further classification may involve examining the plant's characteristics and comparing them to those of other species within the family.
